text.title: Feedback Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Inbound feedback volume > 20 items/day across >= 2 channels?

conclusion.verdict: read items directly; pipeline overhead exceeds value

branch.question: PM committed to dispose top themes monthly?

conclusion.verdict: sentiment-only loops amplify noise without action; commit first

branch.question: Regulated content (HIPAA / GDPR DSAR) requiring DPA review?

conclusion.verdict: run DPA + redaction first; do not feed raw to remote LLM
build canonical store + fixed taxonomy + monthly review

text.example: high_volume=true -> will_act=true -> compliance_blocked=false -> apply pipeline (rule single-canonical-store).
